title: Off topic split Possible Rebuild title names
display_title: Off topic split Possible Rebuild title names
wikitext:
[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Oct 17, 2008 3:01 pm EVANGELION 1.0: YOU ARE (NOT) ALONE EVANGELION 2.0: YOU CAN (NOT) ADVANCE EVANGELION 3.0: YOU CAN (WHY NOT) MASTURBATE ALL OVER HER EVANGELION 4.0: YOU CAN (NOT) SETTLE FOR THIS ENDING

[]: Post by Zaiku » Sat Oct 18, 2008 1:49 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: EVANGELION 1.0: YOU ARE (NOT) ALONE EVANGELION 2.0: YOU CAN (NOT) ADVANCE EVANGELION 3.0: YOU CAN (WHY NOT) MASTURBATE ALL OVER HER EVANGELION 4.0: YOU CAN (NOT) SETTLE FOR THIS ENDING

[]: Post by Axell » Sat Oct 18, 2008 10:31 pm 4.0 It's (not) over agh!

[]: Post by CorporalChaos » Sun Oct 19, 2008 2:27 am I think there's a pattern here with the last word in the title starting with "A" I say one of the titles for a Rebuild film will be You Will (Not) Achieve You heard it here first.

[]: Post by master_lloyd » Sun Oct 19, 2008 12:45 pm YOU ARE (NOT) AN AADVARK.

[]: Post by CorporalChaos » Sun Oct 19, 2008 1:39 pm YOU ARE (NOT) AN ANTI-SEMITE* *This is the renamed title for Rebuild 1.0 in Germany.

[]: Post by Dramamine » Sun Oct 19, 2008 7:45 pm I say that a likely name for one of the movies will be You Will [Not] Survive

[]: Post by AchtungAffen » Mon Oct 20, 2008 11:00 am You are (not) Adolf Hitler

[]: Post by Shockz » Mon Oct 20, 2008 4:41 pm EVANGELION 3.0: YOU ARE (NOT) PREPARED (Old, old WoW joke, I know, I know.)

[]: Post by EvaCub » Tue Oct 21, 2008 8:26 am YOU (ARE) NOT DEAD YET YOU (ARE) NOT GULLIBLE YOU (ARE) NOT SATISFIED

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Oct 21, 2008 12:32 pm In seriousness, I really think a good title for 3.0 or 4.0 mentioned somewhere else should be: I (DON'T) WANT TO DIE Dramamine: Nice suggestion! ;)

[]: Post by EvaCub » Tue Oct 21, 2008 2:52 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: In seriousness, I really think a good title for 3.0 or 4.0 mentioned somewhere else should be: I (DON'T) WANT TO DIE Dramamine: Nice suggestion! ;)

[]: Post by Dartz » Tue Oct 21, 2008 3:17 pm 1.0 You are (not) alone 2.0 You can (not) advance 3.0 You may (not) understand 4.0 You will (not) get a refund Or something like that ---

[]: Post by Axell » Tue Oct 21, 2008 3:33 pm this is (not) the end

[]: Post by universalperson » Tue Oct 21, 2008 5:23 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: In seriousness, I really think a good title for 3.0 or 4.0 mentioned somewhere else should be: I (DON'T) WANT TO DIE Dramamine: Nice suggestion! ;)

[]: Post by AchtungAffen » Thu Oct 23, 2008 11:13 am YOU WILL (NOT) GET YOUR BANK DEPOSITS BACK!

[]: Post by cyharding » Thu Oct 23, 2008 4:48 pm YOU CAN (NOT) BE SERIOUS

[]: Post by BrikHaus » Thu Oct 23, 2008 8:30 pm You Can (Not) Go Directly to Jail. You Can (Not) Pass Go You Can (Not) Collect $200

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Oct 24, 2008 5:45 am You Can (Not) Have Lulz. You Can (Not) RickRoll. (RickRoll as a verb) Does that round up our list?

[]: Post by CtHuLhU » Fri Oct 24, 2008 9:16 am some old titles You are (NOT) Alone. And if you are (VERY) Alone. Then I'm (REALLY) Sorry. I (STILL) KNOW WHAT YOU DID LAST SUMMER (IN A HOSPITAL ROOM) XD YOU ARE (NOT) ALONE TRUST ME, YOU ARE (NOT) ALONE I KNOW IT LOOKS BAD Shinji, BUT YOU ARE (NOT) ALONE F*CK... I TAKE THAT BACK, YOU ARE (SO) ALONE XD
